principles: Frozen contracts and explicit runtime semantics
Scenario evidence must gate release decisions
Metrics must be measured against thresholds
Governance actions must map to executable commands
Type-safety gates are mandatory before release gates

milestones.title: Core Expert & Safety
milestones.description: Enhance core expert routing and expand adversarial safety coverage.

milestones.title: Interoperability & Scale
milestones.description: Implement FHIR/SMART runtime adapters and verify multi-site replication.

milestones.title: Experience & Governance
milestones.description: Improve clinician workflow and governance visibility.

milestones.title: Pilot Readiness
milestones.description: Finalize performance profiling and pilot cutover checklists.

milestones.title: Engineering Reliability
milestones.description: Harden workspace type-safety and build hygiene checks.

milestones.title: Architecture & Quality Guardrails
milestones.description: Enforce dependency boundaries and reduce contract drift.

milestones.title: Release Workflow Readiness
milestones.description: Add release composite gates and align governance docs.

milestones.title: Competition Explainability Experience
milestones.description: Deliver competition-grade decision explainability, routing transparency, and workflow stageboard UX.

milestones.title: Frontend Architecture Hardening
milestones.description: Reduce coupling, add integration regression safety nets, and stabilize presentation quality for demo delivery.

milestones.title: Competition Demo Reliability & Delivery
milestones.description: Improve first-interaction responsiveness, reduce view complexity, harden export critical path, and enforce secret-leak guardrails.

todos.title: Define expert-role provider routing strategy
todos.goal: Define expert-role provider routing strategy (cardio/gp/metabolic/safety) with measurable quality KPIs.
acceptance: Routing strategy document created
KPIs defined and measurable

todos.title: Add adversarial scenario expansion set
todos.goal: Add adversarial scenario expansion set and red-team replay bundle.
acceptance: Adversarial scenarios added to test suite
Red-team replay bundle created

todos.title: Implement runtime FHIR adapter spike
todos.goal: Implement runtime FHIR adapter spike (Patient/Observation/Provenance).
acceptance: FHIR adapter spike implemented
Basic mapping verified

todos.title: Implement SMART auth scope enforcement plan
todos.goal: Implement SMART auth scope enforcement plan (design + mock integration).
acceptance: Auth scope enforcement plan documented
Mock integration verified

todos.title: Add multi-site replication verification
todos.goal: Add multi-site replication verification (site-beta and site-gamma).
acceptance: Replication verified for site-beta
Replication verified for site-gamma

todos.title: Add frontend clinician workflow enhancements
todos.goal: Add frontend clinician workflow enhancements (review queue + evidence drawer).
acceptance: Review queue implemented
Evidence drawer implemented

todos.title: Add governance dashboard draft
todos.goal: Add governance dashboard draft from ledger + trigger matrix outputs.
acceptance: Dashboard draft implemented
Ledger data visualized

todos.title: Add longitudinal follow-up scenario family
todos.goal: Add longitudinal follow-up scenario family (week-over-week progression).
acceptance: Longitudinal scenarios added
Progression logic verified

todos.title: Add performance profiling for replicated replay pipeline
todos.goal: Add performance profiling for replicated replay pipeline.
acceptance: Profiling tools integrated
Baseline performance metrics recorded

todos.title: Define pilot-to-production cutover checklist
todos.goal: Define pilot-to-production cutover checklist version 1.
acceptance: Cutover checklist documented
Reviewer approval obtained

todos.title: Establish workspace typecheck gate command
todos.goal: Establish workspace-level typecheck as a required engineering gate.
acceptance: Root command executes workspace type checks consistently
Backend/frontend/shared expose explicit typecheck scripts
Typecheck gate passes on current codebase

todos.title: Add frontend workflow/event typing regression coverage
todos.goal: Add regression coverage for workflow stage status and stream event typing.
acceptance: Tests cover stream status and event shape boundaries
Typecheck remains green with stricter event typing

todos.title: Add backend dist hygiene guard command
todos.goal: Prevent nested build output and test artifact leakage in backend dist.
acceptance: Dist hygiene guard command exists and fails on malformed output
Backend build passes hygiene checks in clean run

todos.title: Implement backend import-boundary guard checks
todos.goal: Add enforceable checks for application/domain layering boundaries.
acceptance: Guard command detects forbidden imports
Current tree passes guard checks

todos.title: Unify shared package artifact generation workflow
todos.goal: Reduce risk of shared type drift by unifying generated artifacts and source of truth.
acceptance: Shared package build/typecheck workflow is explicit
Backend/frontend imports resolve without relative cross-package paths

todos.title: Create dependency vulnerability baseline and triage workflow
todos.goal: Define repeatable vulnerability baseline, triage ownership, and remediation cadence.
nonGoals: Force-upgrade all dependencies in one change
acceptance: Baseline output path and triage template documented
Workflow command mapping added to process docs

todos.title: Add composite release gate command
todos.goal: Add a single release command aggregating typecheck/test/build/gate checks.
acceptance: Composite command executes full release gate path
Command is referenced by workflow docs

todos.title: Refresh workflow/governance documentation for v5.10
todos.goal: Align operation guides and governance templates with new quality gates.
acceptance: Workflow docs reflect updated gate sequence
Reviewer blocking template references new checks

todos.title: Build decision reasoning cockpit foundation
todos.goal: Build a competition-grade reasoning cockpit with evidence contribution cards, confidence visibility, and scenario simulation controls.
acceptance: Decision reasoning panel shows contribution score, confidence tag, and evidence summary
UI handles missing/partial runtime data without rendering failure
Core interaction logic has frontend regression tests

todos.title: Upgrade complexity routing visualization with factor breakdown
todos.goal: Upgrade routing view into a transparent score breakdown panel with factor scores, threshold corridor, and route-boundary distance.
acceptance: Routing panel displays factorized complexity scores and threshold corridor
Current route and boundary distance are visible and interpretable
Rendering logic remains stable in unit tests

todos.title: Upgrade workflow chart to multi-lane agent stageboard
todos.goal: Replace linear flowchart perception with multi-lane stageboard that highlights agent runtime, durations, retries, and escalation path.
acceptance: Workflow panel includes lane-level runtime status and stage metrics
Escalation branch and safety block states are visually explicit
Component tests cover key state transitions

todos.title: Add competition demo replay and explainability regression bundle
todos.goal: Finalize a polished demo replay path and a regression test bundle to prevent explainability UX regressions before competition demos.
acceptance: Demo mode supports scripted replay narrative for judging presentation
Regression bundle covers decision, routing, and workflow critical states
README includes operator steps for competition demo runbook

todos.title: Decouple retired flow-chart runtime from consultation view
todos.goal: Remove obsolete flow-chart runtime coupling from ConsultationView and make sync hooks optional to reduce runtime and complexity.
acceptance: ConsultationView no longer depends on flow chart runtime plumbing
useConsultationViewSync supports optional flow hook without behavioral regressions
Frontend tests/typecheck/build all pass

todos.title: Add consultation view integration smoke regression suite
todos.goal: Add a lightweight integration smoke suite for key consultation interactions and error boundaries.
acceptance: Consultation submit happy-path and validation failure are covered
Regression catches common runtime handler errors

todos.title: Create frontend copy registry and encoding guard checks
todos.goal: Consolidate top-level UI copy and add guard checks to reduce text drift/garbled strings.
acceptance: Key consultation copy extracted to shared constants
Guard script/test flags malformed UTF-8/garbled literals

todos.title: Add frontend demo performance baseline and budget guard
todos.goal: Track build-size/perf baseline for demo page and enforce a lightweight budget warning command.
acceptance: Performance baseline artifact exists
Budget guard command integrated in workflow docs

todos.title: Prefetch and cache report-export runtime module
todos.goal: Reduce first-click export latency by prefetching and caching report-export runtime dependencies before operator click.
nonGoals: Replace PDF export implementation or redesign report template
acceptance: Report export composable exposes prefetch hook and module cache behavior
Consultation view triggers one-time prefetch when export becomes available
Targeted tests cover prefetch + export happy path

todos.title: Split ConsultationView into section-level presentation modules
todos.goal: Reduce single-file complexity in ConsultationView by extracting stable section-level presentation modules.
acceptance: ConsultationView script/template size reduced by extracting reusable sections
Component contracts remain typed and existing integration tests stay green

todos.title: Expand consultation critical-path integration regression suite
todos.goal: Add integration regressions for export fallback, red-flag escalation, and workflow-stage transitions on ConsultationView.
acceptance: Integration suite covers export success/fallback and red-flag escalation branch
Regression suite runs in workspace frontend test pipeline

todos.title: Add repository secret-leak guard command and workflow wiring
todos.goal: Provide an executable guard command to detect probable committed secrets and wire it into milestone gates.
acceptance: security:secrets command exists and fails on high-risk token patterns
Operation docs include command usage and remediation guidance
